messages.content: Write out a video set in the team fortress universe. The Scout is relaxing in a pond in the nude, giving an interview of himself to the cameraman. The Scout eventually farts in the water, the foul scent killing a few fish. Which he grabs to eat. Write out the scouts dialogue in a boston accent throughout the story.
